description: The Slovak mafia comprises various organized crime groups in Slovakia, primarily controlled by Slovak interests. It emerged after the 1989 revolutions and became well-established in the 1990s, with activities including racketeering, drug trafficking, and political corruption. The groups are traditionally active in security, construction, and nightclub ownership. As of the 2010s, the traditional mafia structure is said to be gone, but smaller drug gangs and criminal networks persist.
